existingTests.title: Admin Apps disposable lifecycle creates deletes finds recycle bin entry and purges it @lifecycle @recycle [surface: Admin] [feature: Lifecycle] [precondition: ALLOW_DATA_WRITE=true and admin user can manage apps] [input: create disposable app, search it, open detail, delete, verify Recycle Bin, purge matching entry] [expected: disposable app is created, deleted, visible in Recycle Bin, and removed after purge] [proof: Admin list-view lifecycle is covered without touching seeded data]
existingTests.displayTitle: Admin Apps disposable lifecycle creates deletes finds recycle bin entry and purges it @lifecycle @recycle

existingTests.title: Admin Objects toolbar has all primary list-view controls from reference screenshot [surface: Admin] [feature: Toolbar controls] [precondition: Objects list view is open] [input: inspect list selector, pin, selected count, search, New, Delete, refresh, settings, fit columns, CSV, PDF] [expected: every primary toolbar control is present] [proof: reference screenshot toolbar behavior is covered in the list-view suite]
existingTests.displayTitle: Admin Objects toolbar has all primary list-view controls from reference screenshot

existingTests.title: Admin list view fit columns action keeps table visible [surface: Admin] [feature: Column sizing] [precondition: Objects table mode is visible] [input: click Fit columns] [expected: table remains visible after auto-resize] [proof: toolbar fit-columns control works on Admin tables]
existingTests.displayTitle: Admin list view fit columns action keeps table visible

scenarios.decision: Existing REG_LIFECYCLE_051 covers the changed feature area; reuse it instead of duplicating.
scenarios.title: @regression Verify shared ui behavior after packages/ui/src/index.tsx [surface: Admin] [feature: Shared UI] [level: Regression] [precondition: Core Platform local stack is available and seeded test credentials can sign in.] [input: Open Admin application -> fill the login details -> click Login -> navigate to Shared UI from the sidebar -> perform the Shared UI action named in the test case -> verify the page or table result] [expected: The changed behavior works as intended, existing list-view contracts remain stable, and any invalid input is handled visibly.] [proof: generated smoke coverage for packages/ui/src/index.tsx]
